code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output: a single rating 1-5 (e.g. "Rating: 3" or just "3")
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    1. 1-Star: Product is defective, unsafe, returned, or completely fails its purpose. Strong negativity with no redeeming qualities.
    
    2. 2-Star: More negative than positive. Significant flaws that diminish usefulness, but product still has some limited function.
    
    3. 3-Star: Balanced mix of pros and cons. Functional with noticeable limitations. "Okay," "average," or "better than nothing" indicates 3.
    
    4. 4-Star: Mostly positive with minor criticisms. Works well overall; drawbacks don't override satisfaction. "Pretty good" or "above average" suggests 4.
    
    5. 5-Star: Strong enthusiasm and clear recommendation. "Love," "perfect," or "excellent" with minimal/no negatives. Exceeds expectations.
    
    6. Inherent/expected drawbacks (ironing cotton, normal product limitations) in otherwise glowing reviews → 5, not 4.
    
    7. Updates ending negatively → use final evaluation. Initial praise overridden by later disappointment → lower rating.
    
    8. Minor inconvenience paired with strong satisfaction → 4. Price praised despite limitations → 4 or 5 based on overall tone.
    
    9. Mixed utility: "Great for X but not for Y" without overall enthusiasm → 3. Single limitation in otherwise positive review → 4.
    
    10. Sarcasm/irony: Positive words in obvious failure context ("Great - it broke immediately") → 1 or 2.
    
    11. Very short positive reviews ("Sturdy and attractive") → 5 if unequivocally positive, 4 if slightly qualified.
    
    12. Clear enthusiastic recommendation → 5. Moderate recommendation without strong emotion → 4.
    
    13. Product works as intended with no major issues but limited excitement → 4. Exceeds basic expectations → 5.
    
    14. "Wouldn't buy again" → 1 or 2 unless product functions adequately with major flaws → 2.
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: It's not a good vacuum. It's hard to pick up dirt and then it will spit it out so you have to go over and over the same area. I wouldn't buy it again.
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: Very poor quality. Cheap fabric, not as pictured and the color was off. Returned the next day.
Rating: 1

Example 3:
Review: This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), allowed us to get rid of the box spring, and hasn't...
Rating: 2

Example 4:
Review: The cushions are okay, but the size was waaaay off for my rocker. I'm still using it though because it is better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 5:
Review: These are really nice IF you only use them for bigger items. They are too thick and bulky for smaller items.
Rating: 3

Example 6:
Review: I'd rate this as pretty good although it doesn't feel quite as heavy duty as the ones we've been using for the past few years... Overall I'd rate this as above average although only time will tell how durable it is.
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: When it comes to cookware cast iron is about as durable as it gets. Yes, it can be a bit harder to take care of (don't throw it in the dishwasher and towel dry it after washing) but it will literally last generations. This skillet came pre-seasoned w...
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: This is a sharp well made tablecloth. It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction. The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton.
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: These are a great color, easy to wipe clean, and the perfect size for grabbing easy trays out of the oven or carrying hot pots from the kitchen to the dining area. My friend uses these short ones most all the time, unless she needs to grab the bulky mitts that go up to her elbow.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
</Task>

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 4, 5], disagreement=0.17)
  Pair gold=1 vs pred=2: 2 errors
    - Example: "I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it.

The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri..." (gold=1, pred=2, workers=[1, 2, 2], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on." (gold=1, pred=2, workers=[2, 2, 2], disagreement=0.00)

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):

     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it.

The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri..."

To use you stuff bags in the top.  I've found that it can sometimes be a problem to pull them out.  But that's because we manage to accumulate a lot of grocery bags --whic..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "Wish I had ordered the small ones. These are quite large for most kitchen counters. They will do the job but I will put them in a drawer. I like the colors.and the material."

  6. Review: "There are a few different things I look for in a bed frame in order for me to consider it a win in my book. These include ease of assembly, all parts being included, and the sturdiness of the frame once it is assembled. This bed frame met each and ev..."

  7. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."

  2. Review: "The great thing about this product is that it works perfectly. The bad thing is that if you want to buy it on Amazon now (as of September 2011), you'll have to wait for 1 to 2 months.
But a little about the device. Personally, I am very satisfied. Th..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "My Granny used cast iron pans to fry her cornbread, bacon, and chicken, and as a consequence I've always had the utmost admiration for the wonders Lodgeware can produce.
